endpoints.name: POST /v1/{app}:exchangeAppAttestAssertion
endpoints.description: Accepts an App Attest assertion and an artifact previously obtained from ExchangeAppAttestAttestation and verifies those with Apple. If valid, returns an AppCheckToken.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APP}} with a real app.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{app}:exchangeAppAttestAttestation
endpoints.description: Accepts an App Attest CBOR attestation and verifies it with Apple using your preconfigured team and bundle IDs. If valid, returns an attestation artifact that can later be exchanged for an AppCheckToken using ExchangeAppAttestAssertion. For convenience and performance, this method's response object will also contain an AppCheckToken (if the verification is successful).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APP}} with a real app.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{app}:exchangeCustomToken
endpoints.description: Validates a custom token signed using your project's Admin SDK service account credentials. If valid, returns an AppCheckToken.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APP}} with a real app.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{app}:exchangeDebugToken
endpoints.description: Validates a debug token secret that you have previously created using CreateDebugToken. If valid, returns an AppCheckToken. Note that a restrictive quota is enforced on this method to prevent accidental exposure of the app to abuse.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APP}} with a real app.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{app}:exchangeDeviceCheckToken
endpoints.description: Accepts a [`device_token`](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/devicecheck/dcdevice) issued by DeviceCheck, and attempts to validate it with Apple. If valid, returns an AppCheckToken.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APP}} with a real app.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{app}:exchangePlayIntegrityToken
endpoints.description: Validates an [integrity verdict response token from Play Integrity](https://developer.android.com/google/play/integrity/verdict#decrypt-verify). If valid, returns an AppCheckToken.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APP}} with a real app.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{app}:exchangeRecaptchaV3Token
endpoints.description: Validates a [reCAPTCHA v3 response token](https://developers.google.com/recaptcha/docs/v3). If valid, returns an AppCheckToken.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APP}} with a real app.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{app}:exchangeSafetyNetToken
endpoints.description: Validates a [SafetyNet token](https://developer.android.com/training/safetynet/attestation#request-attestation-step). If valid, returns an AppCheckToken.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APP}} with a real app.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{app}:generateAppAttestChallenge
endpoints.description: Generates a challenge that protects the integrity of an immediately following call to ExchangeAppAttestAttestation or ExchangeAppAttestAssertion. A challenge should not be reused for multiple calls.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APP}} with a real app.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{app}:generatePlayIntegrityChallenge
endpoints.description: Generates a challenge that protects the integrity of an immediately following integrity verdict request to the Play Integrity API. The next call to ExchangePlayIntegrityToken using the resulting integrity token will verify the presence and validity of the challenge. A challenge should not be reused for multiple calls.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{APP}} with a real app.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Gets the Service configuration for the specified service name.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: DELETE /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified DebugToken. A deleted debug token cannot be used to exchange for an App Check token. Use this method when you suspect the secret `token` has been compromised or when you no longer need the debug token.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: PATCH /v1/{name}
endpoints.description: Updates the specified Service configuration.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{NAME}} with a real name.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/apps/-/appAttestConfig:batchGet
endpoints.description: Atomically gets the AppAttestConfigs for the specified list of apps.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/apps/-/deviceCheckConfig:batchGet
endpoints.description: Atomically gets the DeviceCheckConfigs for the specified list of apps. For security reasons, the `private_key` field is never populated in the response.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/apps/-/playIntegrityConfig:batchGet
endpoints.description: Atomically gets the PlayIntegrityConfigs for the specified list of apps.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/apps/-/recaptchaEnterpriseConfig:batchGet
endpoints.description: Atomically gets the RecaptchaEnterpriseConfigs for the specified list of apps.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/apps/-/recaptchaV3Config:batchGet
endpoints.description: Atomically gets the RecaptchaV3Configs for the specified list of apps. For security reasons, the `site_secret` field is never populated in the response.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/apps/-/safetyNetConfig:batchGet
endpoints.description: Atomically gets the SafetyNetConfigs for the specified list of apps.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/debugTokens
endpoints.description: Lists all DebugTokens for the specified app. For security reasons, the `token` field is never populated in the response.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/debugTokens
endpoints.description: Creates a new DebugToken for the specified app. For security reasons, after the creation operation completes, the `token` field cannot be updated or retrieved, but you can revoke the debug token using DeleteDebugToken. Each app can have a maximum of 20 debug tokens.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: GET /v1/{parent}/services
endpoints.description: Lists all Service configurations for the specified project. Only Services which were explicitly configured using UpdateService or BatchUpdateServices will be returned.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.

endpoints.name: POST /v1/{parent}/services:batchUpdate
endpoints.description: Atomically updates the specified Service configurations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PARENT}} with a real parent.
